Home > LLM > Xiaomi MiMo

Xiaomi MiMo

★★★★☆ Free (activity) Paid from: Free

Visit official site →

Xiaomi's self-developed LLM, MiMo series. New users get generous compute credits, plus more through activities.

Free Credits Details

  • Amount: Credits on signup
  • Reset: No reset
  • Watermark: N/A
  • Commercial: Check official terms

Key Features

  • Open source model
  • Strong math reasoning
  • Code generation
  • Multi-language support
  • Xiaomi ecosystem integration
  • Free API access

Pros

  • Generous signup credits
  • Strong Chinese
  • Fast response

Cons

  • Relatively basic features
  • Less ecosystem than big players

Tips

  • Participate in activities for more credits
  • Good for daily chat and code assistance
